The '''ATA Pulse-wave Blaster''' was a [[pulse-wave blaster]] pistol produced by [[Greff-Timms Industrial/Legends|Greff-Timms Industrial]] and belonged to category of [[Pulse-wave blaster|ancient blasters]]. It fired devastating pockets of coherent energy, but had lackluster range and no option to [[Stun/Legends|stun]] enemies.
